name: Umbrage | 1930 - 1950 Sci-fi Fantasy RPG
description:
Honestly dont know what else to name the bot. I think "Modern Sci-fi Fantasy RPG" works for now.

Welcome to Umbrage! After centuries of advancement, the world has moved out of the medieval era and move into a modern era where anything is possible. Nations compete to establish dominance and unity.
creator: DaveTheGooner
